commands.name: add-project
commands.description: Add .NET project(s) from a git repository to the build program's solution generation

options.name: --git-url
options.description: The git repository URL containing the .NET project(s)

options.name: --projects
options.description: The name(s) of the .NET project(s) in the git repository

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Set the verbosity level (Quiet, Minimal, Normal, Verbose, Diagnostic) [default: Normal]

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new project with Cake Frosting build setup

options.name: --name
options.description: The name of the project folder to create

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite existing directory if it exists [default: False]

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Set the verbosity level (Quiet, Minimal, Normal, Verbose, Diagnostic) [default: Normal]

commands.name: install-skill
commands.description: Install the Claude skill file into the current directory

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite existing skill file if it exists [default: False]

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Set the verbosity level (Quiet, Minimal, Normal, Verbose, Diagnostic) [default: Normal]

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Set the verbosity level (Quiet, Minimal, Normal, Verbose, Diagnostic) [default: Normal]
